transcript:
CALLER: Hi. I need to reschedule my sleep study. I had it booked for Saturday but I forgot I have an office event that weekend.
AGENT: No worries. Could I have your name?
CALLER: Rajendra Bhatt.
AGENT: Found it. Sleep study this Saturday night. Next available Saturday after that would be in two weeks. Would that work?
CALLER: Two weeks should be fine.
AGENT: Rescheduled to two weeks from this Saturday. Same time, 9 PM arrival. SMS with updated date coming shortly.
CALLER: Perfect. Thank you for accommodating.
